title: Beecraft Gui
description: GUI redesigned in the style of Beecraft, overall bee theme of all guis.
body:
![Bee Theme](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f8e95b70f667b9b0c1d10abedb4835e86d5bcb48.png)
- **The Beecraft GUI** features a bee-themed design with a color palette dominated by **yellow** and **orange** hues. All in-game containers and GUIs have been redesigned to reflect this aesthetic. Additionally, heart icons, shields, and the food bar have been adapted to maintain visual consistency with the bee theme.
### ![Hotbar Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/da914ab7ae52cf332e6770a3b0121c186df3da2e.png)
- Get a glimpse of the redesigned hotbar in Beecraft. The hotbar aligns with the bee theme, featuring yellow and orange accents that complement the overall GUI design.
![Hotbar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f404fb70a363001e65e8ad75b306704cd00149f3.png)
### ![Recomendations](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4e2fb8873e9240bfa2f6feefeed5639770b1877d.png)
- For the best experience, we recommend playing the game in English (US). This ensures full compatibility with all GUI elements and provides the most seamless integration with the Beecraft theme.
